lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕ ਕਾ ਕਹਿਆ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: nindak kaa kahiaa koe na maanai |
lines.english: No one belives what the slanderer says.
The slanderer tells lies, and later regrets and repents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਬੁਰਾ ਨ ਮਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa daas kichh buraa na maagai |
lines.english: The Lord's slave does not wish anyone ill.
The Lord does not forgive the slanderer. ||2||
He wrings his hands, and hits his head against the ground.
The slanderer suffers, as if stabbed by a spear.
Like a crane, he spreads his feathers, to look like a swan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖ ਤੇ ਬੋਲਿਆ ਤਾਂ ਕਢਿਆ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mukh te boliaa taan kadtiaa beechaar |3|
lines.english: When he speaks with his mouth, then he is exposed and driven out. ||3||
The Creator is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jan karai su nihachal hoe |
lines.english: That person, whom the Lord makes His Own, becomes stable and steady.
Servant Nanak speaks, after contemplating the essence of reality. ||4||41||54||
The Lord's slave is true in the Court of the Lord.
With my palms pressed together, I offer this prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਧਨੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd dhan tis kee raas |
lines.english: My soul, body and wealth are His property.
He is the Creator, my Lord and Master.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Millions of times, I am a sacrifice to Him. ||1||
The dust of the feet of the Holy brings purity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੇ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਮਿਟਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਮੈਲੁ ਹਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man ke bikaar mitteh prabh simarat janam janam kee mail haree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remembering God in meditation, the mind's corruption is eradicated, and the filth of countless incarnations is washed away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਹਿ ਸਗਲ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai grih meh sagal nidhaan |
lines.english: All treasures are in His household.
His Light shines in each and every heart.
He is the Support of the soul and the breath of life of His devotees. ||2||
He is the Fulfiller of the mind's desires.
Serving Him, the mortal attains honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ਨ ਬਿਰਥੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee sev na birathee jaae |
lines.english: Service to Him does not go in vain.
Chanting and meditating on God, the Treasure of Virtue, His devotees live.
Deep within your mind and body, meditate on the One Lord. ||3||
This Treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the immaculate object.
Following the Guru's Teachings, compassion and contentment are found.
Nanak meditates continually on the Lord's Lotus Feet. ||4||42||55||
Please grant Your Grace, O Lord, and attach me to the hem of Your robe.
The True Guru has listened to my prayer.
Deep within my mind and body, I meditate on God.
All my affairs have been resolved.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The Perfect Guru has dispelled all my fears. ||1||
The All-powerful Divine Guru is the Greatest of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਅਮਰੁ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa amar na mettai koe |
lines.english: No one can erase His Eternal Decree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਈ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabh sukh paaee tis kee sev | rahaau |
lines.english: Serving Him, I obtain all comforts. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਕੀਆ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa keea sabh kichh hoe |
lines.english: Everything is done by Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਰੂਪੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: safal moorat gur tis kaa roop |2|
lines.english: The Guru is the Image of Fulfillment, the Embodiment of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai antar basai har naam |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord abides deep within him.
The Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord, is incomparably beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਸ ਬਿਸੁਏ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: bees bisue jaa kai man paragaas |
lines.english: His mind is totally enlightened and illuminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕਾ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis jan kai paarabraham kaa nivaas |3|
lines.english: Within that person, the Supreme Lord God abides. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਪੇਖੈ ਸੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo pekhai su braham giaan |
lines.english: Wherever he looks, he sees the Wisdom of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਧੋਇ ਧੋਇ ਪੀਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur ke charan dhoe dhoe peevaa |
lines.english: I wash the feet of the Guru, and drink in this water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਸਦ ਜਾਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: tis gur kau sad jaau balihaar |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to that Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਸਦ ਕਰੀ ਨਮਸਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: tis gur kau sad karee namasakaar |
lines.english: I humbly bow to that Guru forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਸਦ ਜੀਵਾ ॥੪॥੪੩॥੫੬॥
lines.translit: gur naanak jap jap sad jeevaa |4|43|56|
lines.english: Chanting and meditating forever on Guru Nanak, I live. ||4||43||56||
